blocks.text: Scan the QR code to open the live portfolio page with all 13 application screenshots from Appendix A of the diploma, the architecture overview, and the implementation details.
Shelf Life Control System — desktop application for automated inventory management at gas station #16, implemented in Python + CustomTkinter + SQLite (3,320 LOC, 17 modules).
FEFO logic — automatic First Expired — First Out batch picking, hard block of expired sales.
Intelligent auto-order — recommendation engine based on 14-day average sales, current stock and planogram.
Full audit trail — every action logged into the ActionLog table; supplier returns and expired write-offs generate acts.
13 screenshots (Appendix A) — operator checkout, FEFO search, catalog, sales history, 7-day losses, auto-order, write-off, planogram, returns, audit log.
Prototype is ready for pilot deployment at gas station #16 and for scaling across the Belorusneft-Gomelobnefteprodukt network.
